title: Earth's Balance
editorialSummary: Ecological science terms grouped by concept. False trail: Decomposer and Detritivore both break down dead organic matter — Decomposer (fungi/bacteria, chemical breakdown) is placed in Trophic Roles while Detritivore (earthworms, pill bugs, physical fragmentation) would be a feeding strategy; Detritivore is deliberately excluded to avoid a near-synonym trap that would make the puzzle unfair. Amensalism (one organism harmed, the other unaffected) is the least-known symbiosis type and creates a mild challenge.

meta.gptRationale: Ecology terms are broadly learnable, but the puzzle mixes role types, system terms, and cycles in a way that demands careful sorting.
